title: OpenAI ships GPT-5 with native tool use and 1M context
description: OpenAI released GPT-5 with native tool use, 1M token context window, and significant improvements in reasoning and code generation.
actionNote: Worth benchmarking against Claude for LawTrades AI features.

title: Vercel ships AI SDK 4.0 with streaming agents and persistent memory
description: Vercel's AI SDK 4.0 adds first-class support for streaming agent responses, persistent agent memory, and built-in tool orchestration. Works with Next.js 15.
actionNote: Directly relevant to LawTrades AI features and The Marketplace frontend stack.

title: Anthropic releases Claude 4 Sonnet with 200K context and computer use v2
description: Anthropic shipped Claude 4 Sonnet, improving code generation by ~40% on SWE-bench and adding computer use v2.

title: Linear ships Cycles v2 — AI sprint planning with automatic priority scoring
description: Linear released Cycles v2 with AI-powered sprint planning that auto-populates cycles based on dependencies, blockers, team velocity, and due dates.
actionNote: Ilolo uses Linear daily. Worth demoing to the LawTrades team.

title: BigLaw firms rolling out autonomous AI agents for contract review
description: Several BigLaw firms announced autonomous AI agents for contract review and due diligence. Still requires senior attorney sign-off.
actionNote: LawTrades should be the marketplace connecting this talent/tech to companies.

title: Cursor 3: Agent-first coding with parallel agents across cloud, SSH, and local
description: Cursor shipped v3.0 rebuilding its interface around AI agents. Agents Window lets devs run dozens of agents in parallel.
actionNote: Ilolo uses Cursor daily — v3.0 is a big deal.

title: Microsoft open-sources Agent Governance Toolkit — covers all 10 OWASP Agentic risks
description: Microsoft released a 7-package open-source system for governing autonomous AI agents covering all 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 risks.
actionNote: Relevant to Ilolo's security focus and LawTrades AI agentic features.

title: Polymarket arbitrage bot made $152K in 6 months on $30-50K capital
description: Bot 0x7a3f... executed ~50,200 trades over 6 months, capturing avg 1.2% spread. Net profit ~$152K. 94.2% win rate. Stack: Python, py-clob-client, Polygon WebSocket.
actionNote: Core research for Ilolo's $100 Polymarket bot. Full research in workspace/research/polymarket-research.md

title: Columbia Law study: 'Informed' Polymarket traders netted $143M since 2024
description: Researchers analyzed 210,000+ trades (2024-2026). Regulatory pressure incoming. Stick to pure arb/market-making for lowest exposure.
actionNote: Stick to pure arb/market-making (risk-neutral) for lowest regulatory exposure.

title: Open-source oracle-lag-sniper: 61.4% win rate exploiting Polymarket's ~55-second Chainlink lag
description: Python asyncio bot exploiting the ~55-second gap between Chainlink oracle updates and Polymarket order book repricing. 3 entry conditions. Backtested on 8,876 markets. Has demo mode (no API keys needed).
actionNote: BEST starting point for Ilolo's $100 bot. Clone and run demo mode for 72h first.

title: Complete Polymarket API setup guide + Builder Program details (2026)
description: Full py-clob-client auth, fee structure (maker 0%, crypto taker 1.8%, geopolitics 0%), rate limits, WebSocket endpoints. Builder Program: $2.5M+ grants, weekly USDC rewards, gasless tx, 15x rate limits.
actionNote: Full bot build checklist in polymarket-research.md. Phase 0: demo mode → Phase 1: $100 USDC → Phase 2: $5/trade live.

title: Polymarket VPS: Dublin <0.5ms CLOB latency + Kalshi cross-platform arb full analysis
description: Polymarket CLOB in Dublin EU — TradoxVPS <0.5ms ($44.9/mo). For oracle-lag ($100 seed) existing EC2 is fine. Kalshi cross-platform arb: 2-5% gross, $800-1200/mo on $10K-20K, but resolution risk is the killer. Need $10K+ on BOTH platforms. Phase 3 only.
actionNote: For $100 seed: use existing EC2. Scale to AWS eu-west-1 (Dublin) when ready for competitive arb.

title: Production Kelly Criterion implementation for Polymarket bots — complete code + sizing for $100 seed
description: Full production risk system: f* = (p-q)/(1-q), fractional Kelly with Brier-tiered alpha (0.10-0.40). For oracle-lag bot at $100: Kelly says $3.56-$5/trade at 61.4% win rate and 0.50-0.55 entry. Cap at 5% bankroll ($5 max), halt at 10% daily drawdown ($90). Python implementation included. Live Polymarket universe: 53K+ markets, $129M 24h volume, $862M liquidity. BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP 15-min Up/Down = best targets for oracle-lag.
actionNote: RESEARCH COMPLETE. Full summary card in polymarket-research.md. Ready to build when Ilolo gives $100 greenlight.

title: PolyGun copy-trading bot + Moon Dev Polymarket Python tutorials (YouTube sweep)
description: PolyGun (Telegram bot, 19K members) auto-copies smart wallet positions on Polymarket with gasless execution. Flow: find wallets on leaderboard/polyax → set fixed copy amount → bot mirrors trades. Moon Dev has two 10h+ Python tutorials (10K+ views) covering full Polymarket API bot build from scratch. Phase 2 play for Ilolo after oracle-lag is profitable.
actionNote: Copy trading = Phase 2 after oracle-lag bot profitable. Moon Dev tutorials worth watching before building. PolyGun for hands-off copy trading of top wallets.

title: gabagool22: $788K in 3 months, 99.5% win rate — pure market making on BTC/ETH Up/Down markets
description: Verified on-chain: gabagool22 made $788K in ~100 days (24,525 markets, 8.9M trades) at 99.52% win rate using algorithmic market making + momentum + spread capture. Runs a Rust bot (Arbigab) with Binance aggTrade WebSocket as primary signal. 365 trades per market window avg. Not predicting direction — capturing bid/ask spread with preemptive cancel on adverse moves. 4-phase upgrade path from oracle-lag to gabagool22-style now documented in polymarket-research.md.
actionNote: Phase 1: oracle-lag (our current plan). Phase 2: Binance aggTrade WebSocket. Phase 3: spread capture. Phase 4: full market making. Full upgrade path in polymarket-research.md.

title: Polymarket Twitter alpha guide: key accounts, whale trackers, news speed breakdown
description: Key accounts: @PolyTrackHQ (whale alerts with win rate), @PolymarketWhales (auto large-trade alerts), @AP/@Reuters/@BNONews (fastest news). News moves Polymarket 10-20% in 60s — window is 5-10s to act. For bot: oracle-lag is structural (no news needed). Phase 3+ add Twitter news feed. Tools: PolyTrack (faster than Twitter for whale alerts), 0xinsider.com (wallet P&L verification), ArbPoly (auto Polymarket+Kalshi arb execution).
actionNote: Follow @PolyTrackHQ + @PolymarketWhales now for passive intel. News-reaction trading = Phase 3+ (too competitive for 00 seed). Use 0xinsider.com to verify any wallet before copy trading.

title: Cursor 3 launches with Agents Window — parallel AI coding agents
summary: Cursor shipped Cursor 3 (April 2, 2026) with a new Agents Window that runs local + cloud coding agents side by side. Engineers can now manage fleets of AI agents, move sessions between local/cloud, and work across multiple repos in one interface. Composer 2 model integrated at /bin/bash.50/1M input tokens. Cursor revenue surpassed B ARR in March 2026.

title: Polymarket-Kalshi arbitrage: 00-1200/month on 0K-20K capital
summary: Updated 2026 guide: buy Yes on one platform + No on the other when prices sum to <.00. Typical 2-5% gross edge per position. Resolution risk is the #1 danger — platforms can resolve the same event differently. ArbPoly automates scanning and execution. Kalshi 2B + Polymarket 0B all-time volume.
